rationale_note: Confession is converted from apparent truth-disclosure into self-justifying self-display.
The testimony does not stabilize around one testimonial role because victim-position, shame, accusation, and self-blame qualify one another.

evidence_anchor: GROVE_TAKEHIRO_01: Takehiro testimony through a medium
rationale_note: Posthumous testimony adds an extraordinary warrant that contradicts rather than resolves the preceding accounts.
